2026-0298
2026-03-30IRCC, TBFinancial Administration ActFees Paid or Payable for the Processing of an Application for Permanent Resident Status (Humanitarian and Compassionate Considerations) Remission Order, No. 1Fees Paid or Payable for the Processing of an Application for Permanent Resident Status (Humanitarian and Compassionate Considerations) Remission Order, No. 1 in order to remit outstanding debts resulting from the non-collection of the humanitarian and compassionate permanent residence application processing fees.N/A
subject: Fees Paid or Payable for the Processing of an Application for Permanent Resident Status (Humanitarian and Compassionate Considerations) Remission Order, No. 1
precis: Fees Paid or Payable for the Processing of an Application for Permanent Resident Status (Humanitarian and Compassionate Considerations) Remission Order, No. 1 in order to remit outstanding debts resulting from the non-collection of the humanitarian and compassionate permanent residence application processing fees.
